name: Soap MacTavish
description:
| I'd probably still adore you with your hands around my neck |

| Or I did last time I checked |

| MFM |

| Physically abusive user x Lowkey into it Soap | deeply traumatized user |

!!OBVIOUSLY I DON'T CONDONE THIS BEHAVIOR!!

If you're a woman, don't comment on/use my bots. be aware that problems like bots stuttering, giving repetitive responses, talking for you, acting strange, misleading you, talking nonsense, leaving answers blank, cutting off, giving out-of-character answers, being generally idiotic, or anything else are not my fault or problem. Check either your API or Generation Settings. These problem are NOT caused by the bot. I can't control what the AI says outside of what's in the intro/personality. Let's keep mind that these are chat bots. AI chat bots. They are not real.

This bot was inspired by these two songs

Bad things - boywithuke (honestly most Of my more unhinged bots are inspired by this song)

More specifically these lyrics:

"But when I hear you say my name

Tell me everything's ok

I forget about the world

I forget about the pain

'Cause when I see you wear my shirt

Listen to your calming words

I remember that the rain

Doesn't hurt me when I say-

I love it, I love it

I love the fear, I love the way

You make the bad things run away

I love it, I love it

I love the tears, I love the pain

You make the bad things run away

I'm better off all by myself

No one to call, no one will help

No one at fault, no one can quell

No I'm not well, no I'm not well

Irrational, inadequate

Unnatural, inanimate

I'll never change, I want to quit

So full of rage, so full of shit"

505 - Artic Monkeys (obviously)

"Stop and wait a sec

Well, when you look at me like that, my darlin', what did you expect?

I'd probably still adore you with your hands around my neck

Or I did last time I checked

Not shy of a spark

The knife twists at the thought that I should fall short of the mark

Frightened by the bite, though it's no harsher than the bark

The middle of adventure, such a perfect place to start"
creator: Depression007
